message:
feat(tui): keycap/action-chip help strip redesign (br-1xt0m.1.3.3)

Replaces plain-text key hint rendering with a keycap/action-chip visual
style. Keys are rendered in reverse-video bold (physical keycap look),
actions appear as dim companion text, and chips are separated by middle-
dot dividers for high scanability.

- Keycap markers (\x01..\x02) in build_key_hints for structured parsing
- push_keycap_chip_spans() renders reverse-video keycaps + dim actions
- render_key_hint_bar() uses new chip renderer
- Help overlay keybinding lines also use keycap style
- chip_width() helper for accurate width accounting
- New test: keycap_chip_spans_produce_reverse_video_keys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
